meaning: adj.无偏见的,公正的,坦白的,率直的
examples: I haven't been completely candid with him.
Natalie is candid about the problems she is having with Steve.
He was no poet himself and didn't care who knew it; and he had a candid nature.
Cedric the Entertainer does soft-bellied dance steps and offers candid imitations of ordinary folks.
When it came to stocks, Barton was the most candid operator I ever encountered.
